# HashAlgorithm

## Summary

Hash algorithm vocabulary.

## Description

HashAlgorithm enumerates hash algorithms used for content integrity verification.

## Metadata

- name: HashAlgorithm

## Entries

- md5: MD5 hash algorithm.
- blake3: [BLAKE3](https://github.com/BLAKE3-team/BLAKE3) hash algorithm.
- sha256: SHA-256 as defined in NIST FIPS 180-4: Secure Hash Standard (SHS).
- sha3: SHA3 variant {256} as standardized by NIST in FIPS 202.
- sha512: SHA-512 as defined in NIST FIPS 180-4: Secure Hash Standard (SHS). Produces a 512-bit hash value.
